creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Wed, 4 Nov 1998, Bill Fumerola wrote:

> On Wed, 4 Nov 1998, Andrey Zakhvatov wrote:
> 
> > > post-patch:
> > > 
> > > 	${MV} ${WKRSRC}/gtksamba.h ${WRKSRC}/gtksamba.h.pre_sed
> > > 	${CAT} ${WRKSRC}/gtksamba.h.pre_sed | \
> > > 	${SED} -e 's#/etc/smb.conf#${PREFIX}/etc/smb.conf#' \
> > > 	>> ${WRKSRC}/gtksamba.h
> >  
> >   This is X application, so /usr/X11R6 prefix suggest, right?
> > But AFAIK, default Samba configuration file is /usr/local/etc/smb.conf,
> > not /usr/X11R6/etc/smb.conf.
> 
> ${PREFIX} is typically /usr/local, and the smb.conf file is typically
> installed in /usr/local/etc/, which is what my line reflects.
> 
> ${X11BASE} is (normally) /usr/X11R6.

I'm sorry. this is wrong. I forgot you used ${X11PREFIX}, the above
${PREFIX} lines should be ${LOCALBASE}. Apologies.

> >   Also, please change CATEGORIES to sysutils, while commiting, it's my fault.
> 
> I am not a committer, please send mail to freebsd-gnats-submit with the
> subject line "ports/8572 follow up" with either the above message or a
> patch to reflect that.
